02.amazon_product_title: ROAV by ANKER Dash Camera DASHCAM C1 R2110 Black 1080P WiFi Sony Exmor IMX323 G Sensor 145 Degree Wide Angle WDR Night Vision with 32GB Card and USB Car Charger

amazon_bullet_points: CLEAR 1080P RECORDING — Captures full HD 1920×1080 video at 30FPS for detailed everyday driving footage.
ENHANCED NIGHT VISIBILITY — SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor with WDR Superior Night Vision helps record clearer footage and license plates in low light.
WIDE ROAD COVERAGE — 145° wide-angle lens records up to 4 lanes of traffic to capture more of the road ahead.
AUTOMATIC INCIDENT CAPTURE — Built-in G-Sensor detects sudden stops or collisions and starts recording when impact events occur.
EASY VIDEO ACCESS — Built-in Wi-Fi connects to the Roav app for reviewing, downloading, and sharing footage from your dash cam.

04.amazon_product_description:
ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 (Model R2110) is a compact black dash camera designed for drivers who want dependable front-road recording with convenient access to their footage. It records in full HD 1080P at 30FPS, helping capture clear everyday driving video for commuting, road trips, and routine parking situations. The 145° wide-angle lens covers up to 4 lanes of traffic, giving you a broader view of the road ahead.

For low-light driving, the SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor works with WDR Superior Night Vision and an F1.8 lens with 6 high-quality glass elements to improve visibility in darker conditions. The built-in G-Sensor automatically starts recording when sudden stops or collisions occur, supporting incident documentation when it matters most.

Built-in Wi-Fi lets you connect the dash camera to the Roav app so you can review, download, and share videos without removing the device. The 2.4" illuminated screen also makes on-device viewing more accessible. With its compact housing, top-mounted bracket, and straightforward control layout, the DASHCAM C1 is suited for drivers looking for practical recording, app-based convenience, and consistent performance. The package includes the DashCam C1, 32GB card, Anker 2-Port USB car charger, Micro-USB charging cable, and Owner’s Manual.

amazon_aplus_content.seller_or_brand_story: ROAV by ANKER designs practical in-car technology focused on dependable performance, straightforward use, and thoughtful everyday functionality. With features that support clear recording, app-connected access, and reliable operation across changing driving conditions, the brand emphasizes useful design and product quality for daily drivers.

feature_section_1.headline: Clear Front-Road Recording
feature_section_1.supporting_text: Full HD 1080P recording at 30FPS helps capture detailed driving footage for commuting, road trips, and routine daily travel. The 145° wide-angle lens records up to 4 lanes of traffic, giving drivers a broader forward view.

feature_section_2.headline: Stronger Visibility in Low Light
feature_section_2.supporting_text: The SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor works with WDR Superior Night Vision, an F1.8 lens, and 6 glass lens elements to improve clarity in darker conditions. This helps support more usable footage when driving at night or in low-light environments.

feature_section_3.headline: Automatic Incident Detection
feature_section_3.supporting_text: A built-in G-Sensor monitors sudden stops and collisions, then starts recording when impact events occur. This added responsiveness helps preserve important footage when unexpected driving situations happen.

feature_section_4.headline: Convenient Access and Daily Use
feature_section_4.supporting_text: Built-in Wi-Fi connects the dash camera to the Roav app for reviewing, downloading, and sharing videos without added complexity. A 2.4-inch illuminated screen, included 32GB card, and included Anker 2-port USB car charger support straightforward everyday setup and operation.

customer_faq.question: What does this dash camera record?
customer_faq.answer: It records front-road video in 1080P at 30FPS with a 1920×1080 resolution.

customer_faq.question: Can I view or download videos without removing the camera?
customer_faq.answer: Yes. The dash camera has built-in Wi-Fi and works with the Roav app, which lets you review, download, and share videos.

customer_faq.question: How wide is the camera’s field of view?
customer_faq.answer: It has a 145° wide-angle view, which is described as recording up to 4 lanes of traffic.

customer_faq.question: Does it automatically save footage during a sudden stop or collision?
customer_faq.answer: Yes. It includes a G-Sensor (gravity sensor) that monitors sudden stops or collisions and starts recording when impact events occur.

customer_faq.question: What comes in the box?
customer_faq.answer: The package includes the DashCam C1, an Anker 2-Port USB car charger, a Micro-USB charging cable, a 32GB card, and the Owner’s Manual.

social_media_posts.caption_text: When a sudden stop happens, details matter. DASHCAM C1 uses a built-in G-Sensor to start recording during sudden stops or collisions, helping you keep important driving footage when you need it most.

social_media_posts.caption_title: Low-light driving can make footage harder to trust
social_media_posts.caption_text: Night driving is challenging enough without unclear video. DASHCAM C1 combines a SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor, WDR Superior Night Vision, and an F1.8 lens to support clearer recording in darker conditions.

social_media_posts.caption_title: Want quick access to your videos without extra hassle?
social_media_posts.caption_text: For commuting, road trips, and daily driving, DASHCAM C1 records in 1080P with a 145° wide-angle view and built-in Wi-Fi. Use the Roav app to review, download, and share footage more easily.

amazon_product_description.amazon_product_description:
ROAV by ANKER DASHCAM C1 (Model R2110) is a compact black dash camera designed for drivers who want dependable front-road recording with convenient access to their footage. It records in full HD 1080P at 30FPS, helping capture clear everyday driving video for commuting, road trips, and routine parking situations. The 145° wide-angle lens covers up to 4 lanes of traffic, giving you a broader view of the road ahead.

For low-light driving, the SONY Exmor IMX323 sensor works with WDR Superior Night Vision and an F1.8 lens with 6 high-quality glass elements to improve visibility in darker conditions. The built-in G-Sensor automatically starts recording when sudden stops or collisions occur, supporting incident documentation when it matters most.

Built-in Wi-Fi lets you connect the dash camera to the Roav app so you can review, download, and share videos without removing the device. The 2.4" illuminated screen also makes on-device viewing more accessible. With its compact housing, top-mounted bracket, and straightforward control layout, the DASHCAM C1 is suited for drivers looking for practical recording, app-based convenience, and consistent performance. The package includes the DashCam C1, 32GB card, Anker 2-Port USB car charger, Micro-USB charging cable, and Owner’s Manual.
